data.title: Google, Marvell In AI Chip Talks As Nvidia Competition Heats Up
data.description: Reportedly, Google is discussing the production of updated versions of its AI chips, known as TPUs, with Marvell. This collaboration comes at a crucial time as sales of AI chips are on the rise and could potentially have a positive impact on Google's stock value. The competition with Nvidia in the AI chip market is intensifying, making this potential partnership between Google and Marvell a significant development that investors are closely monitoring.
Weekend Round-Up: Binance Rivals Major Exchanges, Bitcoin's Million-Dollar Potential And More

data.title: Dogecoin, Shiba Inu Holders Move Over $300M From Robinhood: What Do They Know?
data.description: Dogecoin (DOGE) and Shiba Inu (SHIB) have experienced notable price increases in the past month, with DOGE rising by 7% and SHIB by 6%. This surge in prices is attributed to a positive shift in overall market sentiment and significant movements of tokens from exchanges by large holders. Data from Whale Alert revealed that both DOGE and SHIB saw substantial transfers from Robinhood to private wallets, indicating a decrease in immediate selling pressure. Specifically, Dogecoin holders moved more than 2.56 billion DOGE, equivalent to about $245 million, in five transactions, marking one of the largest liquidity withdrawals in DOGE's history in a single day. Additionally, Shiba Inu holders transferred over 16 trillion SHIB tokens. These developments signify a bullish trend for both cryptocurrencies amidst growing investor interest.

data.title: Eli Lilly's Pill Lags Novo Nordisk's In First Week. Why Stock Rallied.
data.description: Analysts reported that Eli Lilly's new oral weight-loss medication, Foundayo, garnered 1,390 prescriptions during its initial week of availability. This falls short compared to Novo Nordisk's equivalent product. Despite this, Eli Lilly's stock saw a significant rally.

data.title: Bitcoin skyrockets over $77,000 and stocks hit record highs after Iran declares Strait of Hormuz open during ceasefire.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin surged to over $77,000 while stock indices achieved record levels. This rise came after news that the Strait of Hormuz in Iran is accessible due to a ceasefire.
Iran Declares Strait Of Hormuz Open To All Vessels: Crude Plunges 14%, Airlines And Cruise Stocks Soar

data.title: Payward, parent company of Kraken, to acquire Bitnomial for $550M, granting access to CFTC-licensed crypto derivatives in the U.S.
data.description: Kraken's recent acquisition will provide the company with access to a fully licensed crypto derivatives infrastructure in the United States. This move will strengthen Kraken's position in the market and expand its offerings to customers.

data.title: ZEC's at $330 facing crucial juncture: breakout to $350+ or crash to $300? 72 hours crucial for outcome.
data.description: Trading at $330, Zcash is currently in a precarious neutral zone as institutional investors are preparing for potential volatility. The next 72 hours are crucial as they will determine if ZEC surpasses resistance levels to reach $350 or experiences a drop to $300 support.

data.title: ORDI aims for $2.80 as Death Cross forms, bulls must act in 72 hours. 20% crash reveals $5.00 must be reclaimed by Thursday to avoid further decline.
data.description: A recent decline of 20% in ORDI reveals the vulnerability of the previously strong market trend. Technical analysis foresees a potential further drop to $2.80 within the next week if buyers fail to push the price back above $5.00 by Thursday.

data.title: TRX near $0.34 resistance, correction to $0.30 likely in next 2 weeks as TRON seeks breakout.
data.description: TRON's price is nearing a crucial resistance level at around $0.34 following a series of recent gains. Technical analysis points towards a potential retracement to the $0.30 support level before any significant breakout is expected.

data.title: BNB's price at $625 is on the brink of a breakout to $650+ or breakdown to $580 as whales and retail investors anticipate movement.
data.description: The price of BNB is currently at $625, with institutional investors ready for a potential shift, as retail investors are also increasing their long positions. The next three days are critical, as they will decide whether BNB will experience a significant surge to $650 or more, or face a quick decline.

data.title: DOGE hovers at $0.10, stagnant with decreasing momentum and low volume. Likely to trade between $0.08-$0.12 until a significant event sparks movement.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Dogecoin is currently experiencing a slowdown, hovering at $0.10 with decreasing momentum and dwindling trading volume. It is anticipated that the digital currency will undergo erratic trading within the $0.08-$0.12 range until a significant event occurs to drive its value.

data.title: AAVE's descent speeds up towards $75 support within 2 weeks amid 16.6% drop, institutional investors positioning for correction.
data.description: AAVE experienced a significant drop of 16.6%, breaking through crucial technical thresholds. Institutional investors are taking advantage of the dip to enter positions in anticipation of a further decline. The token is now targeting the $74.75 support level, with momentum indicators supporting this trajectory.

data.title: Stock HIGH plummets 35% to $0.20 in 1 week before surging to $0.50, creating a potential breakout.
data.description: After reaching $0.50 during a parabolic surge, HIGH experienced a typical blow-off top, leading to a necessary 35% retracement to $0.20 support. This correction prepares the stock for a potential uptrend towards new highs surpassing $0.50.

data.title: XRP at $1.44 aims for $2.50 breakout with whales holding 71.7% long bias. Institutional money bullish on upside.
data.description: XRP is currently trading at $1.44, and there is significant interest from institutional investors in its upward potential despite recent stagnant movement. Large investors, known as whales, are indicating a possible increase towards $2.50. However, there is a key resistance at $1.89 that could derail this momentum.

data.title: Mass exodus looming as TREE faces bloodbath, testing $0.05 support with 15% interest drop signaling retail overleverage. Smart money exiting.
data.description: The decline in open interest for TREE by 15%, along with negative funding rates, suggests that many retail investors are heavily leveraged and in a vulnerable position. It is predicted that the token will likely drop to a support level of $0.05 in the next two weeks as more experienced investors are discreetly withdrawing their funds.

data.title: ENJ's price surges by 16.76%, targets $0.08 in 14 days. Whales hold 55% long positions, 70% chance of hitting resistance.
data.description: ENJ has surged by 16.76%, surpassing all key moving averages, as whales heavily invest with a 55% long position. The gaming token is poised for a push towards the $0.08 resistance level, with a 70% likelihood of reaching this target.

data.title: Quickplay's Triple Play of New Customers, Products and Partnerships Set to Dominate NAB 2026
data.description: Today at the 2026 NAB Show in Las Vegas, Quickplay introduced a range of updates, including a new AI-powered system that detects social signals and trending topics, linking them to relevant content. This marks a significant advancement in the company's offerings, enhancing user experience and engagement. The unveiling of this innovative solution showcases Quickplay's commitment to staying at the forefront of technology.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures, Oil Prices Loom; Trump Announces New Iran Talks With Hormuz Shut
data.description: President Trump revealed on Monday that new discussions will be held with Iran as tensions rise due to Iran maintaining tight control over the Strait of Hormuz. This has led to concerns about the future of oil prices and futures. Additionally, investors are eagerly awaiting the upcoming Tesla earnings report. The Dow Jones futures have been affected by these developments, reflecting the uncertainty in the market. The situation remains tense as various economic aspects are impacted, indicating a potentially volatile period ahead.

data.title: Block Blast! Brings Its Brand to Coachella as Visibility Grows in the U.S.
data.description: An advertisement for Block Blast! was showcased at Coachella on April 17 through a branded ad truck and an aerial banner activation in Los Angeles.
